Tests assignment and comparison of a variable with a string value in JavaScript.

# Purpose
This code is a simple script that demonstrates variable assignment and type checking in JavaScript. It initializes a variable `a` with the value `null` and then reassigns it to the string `'null'`. The script concludes with an assertion using `assert` to verify that the value of `a` is indeed the string `'null'`. This code provides narrow functionality, focusing on basic variable manipulation and validation.
